description: react-tooltip pr-1278: the delegated document-level event handler assumes every event target is an element; an event whose target is the document itself (not an element node) makes anchor resolution read element-only properties and throw, breaking tooltip event handling — non-element targets must be ignored safely (real react-tooltip issue)
